mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_verifications (user_id, status, applied_at) VALUES (#{userId}, 'PENDING', now())
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_verifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'PENDING' )
SELECT id, user_id, status, applied_at, approved_at, rejection_reason FROM user_verifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY applied_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants cp JOIN challenges c ON c.id = cp.challenge_id WHERE cp.user_id = #{userId} AND cp.result = 'SUCCESS'
AND c.end_date >= CAST(#{since} AS DATE)
